comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Oracle review accepted: configuration service must use canonical LoopPersistedState instead of the Ralph facade because the facade maps draft to paused. Also guard against lost updates/races with agent_end/ralph_continue using a clear load-validate-write discipline or lock.

comments.author: backlog
comments.text: User requirement: the configuration service must expose all configurable Ralph state mutations, not only execution contract fields. Treat tau-o6hb as the source inventory for what the UI/service must cover and preserve all runtime/system fields unchanged.
